---
title: "Caroline Bowles"
---

## Caroline Bowles

**Dates:** (d. 1896)

**Maiden name:** (Barlow)

### Description

mother of the Rev. Henry Bowles

### Biography

Daughter of Robert Barlow of Holybourne, she was wife of the Rev. Henry Albany Bowles, sr..

### Letters

- Letter from March 2 [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
